outputPath.title: Output Path
outputPath.description: Base path for generated Dart files relative to package root.

packageName.title: Package Name
packageName.description: Dart package name for import paths.

generateTokenFiles.title: Generate Token Files
generateTokenFiles.description: Generate individual Dart token constant files (colors, spacing, typography, etc.).

generateThemeData.title: Generate ThemeData
generateThemeData.description: Generate complete Flutter ThemeData builder function with Material 3 component themes.

generateThemeExtension.title: Generate ThemeExtension
generateThemeExtension.description: Generate EdnetTokens ThemeExtension with lerp support.

generateEdnetDsl.title: Generate EDNet DSL v2 YAML
generateEdnetDsl.description: Generate domain model YAML from component structure with ednet:* custom properties.

classPrefix.title: Class Prefix
classPrefix.description: Prefix for generated Dart class names (e.g. Ednet, Morfik).

includeDocComments.title: Include Doc Comments
includeDocComments.description: Add /// doc comments to generated Dart constants.
